'''''AZ 7-62''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] present at the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Azzameen Station/Legends|Azzameen Home Base]] the day [[Aeron Azzameen]] and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] inspected three compromised [[Azzameen cargo fields|family cargo areas]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
